name: Chicken Breasts Neptune
recipeIngredient: Boneless, skinless Chicken breast halves (4 large)
King Crab or Snow Crab (6 oz, frozen, thawed)
Dry White Wine or Chicken Broth (1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken between sheets of plastic wrap with a flat side of a mallet until it is 1/4 inch thick and 6-8 inches across.
2. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the chicken.
3. Place crabmeat on one end of each breast and sprinkle with lemon juice.
4. Roll up the chicken to encase the filling, folding edges if desired.
5. Roll in cornstarch, coating heavily.
6. Heat butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
7. Sauté the chicken for 15 minutes or until cooked through, turning to brown evenly. Remove from pan and keep warm.
8. Add green onions and green peppers to the pan and sauté for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
9. Stir in flour, add wine, and bring to a boil, stirring up brownings.
10. Add cream and continue boiling until the sauce is thickened and smooth.
11. Return chicken to the pan and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
12. Serve garnished with chopped parsley.
